summary: Iteration 54: Tested Programs Hub 'Replicate' column behavior, Pricing Hub with Pricing/Tiers toggle columns, Homepage flagship replicate_to_flagship functionality, Express Your Interest (renamed from Notify Me), and Sponsor A Life navigation. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test notify-me subscriber created via API and UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 54 verified all requested features: (1) Programs Hub shows 'Replicate' column (with Copy icon, purple text) - shows toggle ONLY when Upcoming is ON, shows '—' when OFF. Program 5 (Quad Layer) has is_upcoming=true and shows Replicate toggle (which is ON). Programs with is_upcoming=false (e.g., AMRP, SoulSync, etc.) show '—' instead of toggle. (2) Programs Hub has NO Pricing/Tiers columns (moved to Pricing Hub). Description says 'Use Pricing Hub for prices & tier visibility'. (3) Pricing Hub has 'Pricing' and 'Tiers' toggle columns. Price inputs use type='text' with inputMode='decimal' (no number spinners). (4) Homepage Flagship: Program 5 with replicate_to_flagship=true uses UpcomingCard style, others use SimpleFlagshipCard with purple 'Know More' button (bg-purple-600). (5) 'Notify Me' renamed to 'Express Your Interest' everywhere. (6) Program detail page shows 'Express Your Interest' button when enrollment not open (program 5 with enrollment_status='closed'). Clicking reveals email form that submits to /api/notify-me. Success message: 'You'll be notified when enrollment opens!'. (7) Sponsor A Life nav link correctly navigates to /sponsor page.

verified: Replicate column visible with Copy icon and purple text
Replicate toggle shows ONLY when Upcoming is ON (e.g., program 5)
Replicate shows dash '—' when Upcoming is OFF (e.g., programs 2,3,4,6)
No Pricing/Tiers columns in Programs Hub
Description mentions 'Use Pricing Hub for prices'
Pricing column with toggle switch present
Tiers column with toggle switch present
Price inputs are plain text (type='text', inputMode='decimal')
No number spinners on price inputs
Description: 'Prices shown here apply to both homepage cards and program detail pages'
Program 5 (replicate_to_flagship=true, is_upcoming=true) shows as UpcomingCard
Program 1 (replicate_to_flagship=false, is_upcoming=true) shows as SimpleFlagshipCard
Programs 2,3,4,6 (is_upcoming=false) show as SimpleFlagshipCard
SimpleFlagshipCard has purple 'Know More' button (bg-purple-600)
'Notify Me' text NOT found on any page
'Express Your Interest' text found on program detail page CTA
Button reveals email form on click
Form submits to /api/notify-me
Success message: 'You'll be notified when enrollment opens!'
Sponsor A Life link visible in header nav
Clicking navigates to /sponsor page correctly
Sponsor page shows 'Shine a Light in a Life' title
POST /api/notify-me creates subscription
GET /api/notify-me returns subscribers list
API handles both valid and edge case emails
